CREATE TABLE ip_addresses (id INT PRIMARY KEY, ip inet);
INSERT INTO ip_addresses (id, ip) VALUES (1, inet '192.168.1.1');
INSERT INTO ip_addresses (id, ip) VALUES (2, inet '192.168.1.5');
INSERT INTO ip_addresses (id, ip) VALUES (3, inet '192.168.1.10');
SELECT * FROM ip_addresses WHERE ip >= inet '192.168.1.5';
SELECT id, ip FROM ip_addresses WHERE ip >= inet (SELECT ip FROM ip_addresses WHERE id = 1) ;
CREATE TABLE network_segments (segment_id INT PRIMARY KEY, net inet);
INSERT INTO network_segments (segment_id, net) VALUES (1, inet '192.168.1.0/24');
INSERT INTO network_segments (segment_id, net) VALUES (2, inet '192.168.2.0/24');
SELECT ns.segment_id FROM network_segments ns JOIN ip_addresses ip ON ns.net >= ip.ip WHERE ip.ip >= inet '192.168.1.5';
SELECT ip.id, ip.ip FROM ip_addresses ip WHERE ip.ip >= inet '192.168.1.5' AND ip.id IN (SELECT id FROM ip_addresses WHERE ip >= inet '192.168.1.5');
SELECT DISTINCT ip.id FROM ip_addresses ip WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM network_segments ns WHERE ns.net >= ip.ip) AND ip.ip >= inet '192.168.1.5';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ip_addresses ip WHERE ip.ip >= inet '192.168.1.5' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM network_segments ns WHERE ns.net >= ip.ip);
CREATE TABLE duplicate_ips (ip inet UNIQUE);
INSERT INTO duplicate_ips (ip) VALUES (inet '192.168.1.5');
INSERT INTO duplicate_ips (ip) VALUES (inet '192.168.1.10');
CREATE TABLE user_activity (user_id INT, last_active inet);
INSERT INTO user_activity (user_id, last_active) VALUES (101, inet '192.168.1.5');
SELECT user_id FROM user_activity WHERE last_active >= inet '192.168.1.5' MINUS SELECT user_id FROM user_activity WHERE last_active < inet '192.168.1.5';
SELECT user_id FROM user_activity WHERE last_active >= inet (SELECT ip FROM duplicate_ips WHERE ip = inet '192.168.1.5');
